extortion.description: Accident Injury Solicitors - This is a company of lawyers who deal with various cases, from murder, theft to small cases such as road accidents! This company has very weak security and many vulnerabilities in the network! In connection with which it paid for everything and all company data and client data were compromised! All lawyers' cases, the entire financial history of the company, a lot of confidential information, passports, medical records and much more became generally available!
